articles.headline: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
articles.description: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
images.caption: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: England sign off WC prep with 3-0 win as Rice, Gordon, Watkins score
articles.description: Returning Declan Rice set England on course for a morale-boosting 3-0 victory against Costa Rica after a heavy thunderstorm in Orlando delayed their final World Cup warmup match by an hour.

images.name: Declan Rice [1296x729]
images.caption: Declan Rice opened the scoring for England shortly after 10 minutes played.

images.name: Tuchel: England can't be World Cup favourites
images.caption: Thomas Tuchel says England can't be favourites because there are "proven winners" at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
articles.description: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

images.name: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
images.caption: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

articles.headline: Argentina wins as Messi scores in cameo in front of 88k in Alabama
articles.description: Argentine legend Messi, who is working his way back from muscle fatigue ahead of the start of the FIFA World Cup, came on in the 70th minute and scored from the penalty spot right after in his team's 3-0 win over Iceland.

images.name: Messi celeb Arg Iceland_260609 [1296x729]
images.caption: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.
images.alt: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.

images.name: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
images.caption: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

articles.headline: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
articles.description: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

images.name: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
images.caption: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

articles.headline: Martínez: Cristiano Ronaldo sets the example for Portugal
articles.description: Roberto Martínez says Cristiano Ronaldo is not thinking about his Portugal future beyond the World Cup.

images.name: Martínez: Cristiano Ronaldo sets the example for Portugal
images.caption: Roberto Martínez says Cristiano Ronaldo is not thinking about his Portugal future beyond the World Cup.

stats.name: appearances

keyEvents.text: Goal! Slovakia 1, Malta 0. Lukás Haraslín (Slovakia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Ondrej Duda.
Ondrej Duda (Slovakia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Juan Corbalan (Malta) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Slovakia 1, Malta 1. Joseph Mbong (Malta) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Zach Muscat.
Tomás Suslov (Slovakia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Zach Muscat (Malta) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Henry Bonello (Malta) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Slovakia 2, Malta 1. Roland Galcík (Slovakia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Adrián Kaprálik.

commentary.text: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
First Half begins.
Goal! Slovakia 1, Malta 0. Lukás Haraslín (Slovakia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Ondrej Duda.

play.text: Goal! Slovakia 1, Malta 0. Lukás Haraslín (Slovakia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Ondrej Duda.

commentary.text: Ondrej Duda (Slovakia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

play.text: Ondrej Duda (Slovakia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

commentary.text: Juan Corbalan (Malta) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

play.text: Juan Corbalan (Malta) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

commentary.text: Goal! Slovakia 1, Malta 1. Joseph Mbong (Malta) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Zach Muscat.

play.text: Goal! Slovakia 1, Malta 1. Joseph Mbong (Malta) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Zach Muscat.

commentary.text: Substitution, Slovakia. Róbert Bozeník replaces David Strelec.
Fourth official has announced 1 minutes of added time.
Tomás Suslov (Slovakia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

play.text: Tomás Suslov (Slovakia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

commentary.text: First Half ends, Slovakia 1, Malta 1.
Substitution, Malta. Paul Mbong replaces Joseph Mbong.
Substitution, Malta. Enrico Pepe replaces Kean Scicluna.
Second Half begins Slovakia 1, Malta 1.
Substitution, Slovakia. Matús Bero replaces Peter Pokorny.
Substitution, Slovakia. Adrián Kaprálik replaces László Bénes.
Substitution, Malta. Myles Beerman replaces Juan Corbalan.
Substitution, Malta. Kevin Cannavò replaces Keyon Ewurum.
Zach Muscat (Malta) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

play.text: Zach Muscat (Malta) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

commentary.text: Substitution, Malta. Gabriel Mentz replaces Zach Muscat.
Substitution, Malta. Brandon Paiber replaces Teddy Teuma.
Substitution, Malta. Andrea Zammit replaces Alexander Satariano.
Substitution, Slovakia. Roland Galcík replaces Tomás Suslov.
Substitution, Slovakia. Mário Sauer replaces Lukás Haraslín.
Substitution, Slovakia. Artur Gajdos replaces Ondrej Duda.
Substitution, Malta. Aleandro Garzia replaces Ilyas Chouaref.
Substitution, Slovakia. Peter Kovácik replaces Hugo Pávek.
Substitution, Slovakia. Michal Fasko replaces Martin Valjent.
Substitution, Slovakia. Krisztián Bari replaces Lubomír Satka.
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.
Henry Bonello (Malta) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

play.text: Henry Bonello (Malta) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

commentary.text: Substitution, Malta. Jake Grech replaces Matthew Guillaumier.
Substitution, Malta. Jean Borg replaces Kurt Shaw.
Goal! Slovakia 2, Malta 1. Roland Galcík (Slovakia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Adrián Kaprálik.

play.text: Goal! Slovakia 2, Malta 1. Roland Galcík (Slovakia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Adrián Kaprálik.

commentary.text: Second Half ends, Slovakia 2, Malta 1.
Match ends, Slovakia 2, Malta 1.
